name: Testimonial Cards
description: Two-column layout featuring a large pull quote on one side and author story-cards on the other. Uses hero-grid or similar two-column structure for balanced credibility presentation.

structure.html:
{{quote}}

{{author_role}}

{{author_name}}

{{author_bio}}

{{author_2_role}}

{{author_2_name}}

{{author_2_bio}}

quote.default: The structure and restraint of this system made our landing page feel genuinely premium without any gimmicks.

author_bio.default: Design lead at a SaaS company focused on developer tools and premium interfaces.

author_2_bio.default: Built and shipped the company's design system across three product lines.

variants.name: single-author
variants.description: Only one author card alongside the quote

variants.name: compact
variants.description: Horizontal layout with quote and author side by side in a single card
variants.html_diff: Wrap quote and author info in a single card-row with inline layout
